# Book Scraper & Data Dashboard

An end-to-end Python project that scrapes book data, performs exploratory data analysis (EDA), and visualizes the results on an interactive web dashboard.

##  Project Structure
* `scraper.py`: Extracts raw book listings, prices, and details.
* `books_dataset.csv`: The structured dataset generated by the scraper.
* `eda.py`: Cleans the raw data and generates statistical insights.
* `price_distribution.png`: Visual plot tracking distribution trends.
* `dashboard.py`: Interactive user interface to explore the dataset.

##  How to Run the Project
1. Install dependencies: `pip install pandas matplotlib streamlit requests beautifulsoup4`
2. Execute the scraper: `python scraper.py`
3. Launch the web dashboard: `streamlit run dashboard.py`
